narrative:
Sandusky C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 705 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
